title: Company Overview & Homepage
content:
WS Display (WSDisplay SCA) is a wholesale supplier of trade show displays, portable banner stands, fabric displays, outdoor flags, canopy tents, table throws, SEG extrusion frames, and home goods products. They serve the sign and display industry as a B2B wholesaler for resellers and distributors.

Contact Information:
- Phone: 800-640-9544
- Address: 5960 Pascal Ct., Carlsbad, CA 92008
- Email: info@wsdisplay.com
- Returns Email: returns@wsdisplay.com
- Website: www.wsdisplay.com

Warehouses:
- Carlsbad, CA (5960 Pascal Ct., Carlsbad, CA 92008)
- Carlisle, PA (6 Pine Hill Dr., Carlisle, PA)

Social Media:
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/wsdisplay
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/wsdisplay
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wsdisplay/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/wsdisplay/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@WSDisplayOfficial

Main Product Categories:
1. One Choice Products (bulk/value program)
2. Trade Show Booths (modular booth systems)
3. Retractable Banner Stands
4. Fabric Displays
5. SEG Extrusions (Resort Collection aluminum frames)
6. Flags & Outdoor Displays
7. Table Throws
8. Indoor Banner Stands
9. Home Goods (towels, blankets, canvas frames)
10. Custom Printing
11. Counters & Accessories

Value Propositions:
- Same-day shipping on hardware orders placed by 3:00 PM PT (CA) or noon PT (PA)
- 1-day turnaround on select graphic products
- Free ground bulk shipping on One Choice products
- WS Prime program for free ground shipping
- 15% showroom discount when company logo is displayed
- Blind/drop shipping available free of charge
- Net 30 credit terms available (starting at $2,500)

Departments:

- Project Development: Led by Mike M., VP of Sales, with regional managers and project coordinators handling custom builds and trade show projects.
- Graphic Design (Ext. 201-211): Managed by Orlando C., handling artwork, proofing, and design services.
- Returns Processing: Direct inquiries to returns@wsdisplay.com

title: FAQ - Membership
content:
Membership FAQs:

Q: Can I join as a reseller?
A: Yes, if you work in the sign & display industry. Visit the Login/Register page and complete the registration form after reading the Terms and Conditions.

Q: Are there hidden fees?
A: No, membership is completely free.

Q: How do I create an account?
A: Click Login/Register, then 'New Member?' and complete Steps 1 & 2. Activation typically occurs within an hour of submitting required documents.

Q: How do I log in?
A: Enter your email and password on the login page, or click 'My Account' from any page.

Q: I forgot my password. What do I do?
A: Click 'Forgot my password' on the login page, enter your email, and follow the prompts sent to you.

Q: How do I edit my account information?
A: Log into 'My Account,' then modify any details as needed.

Q: Can multiple people from one company share a login?
A: Yes, sharing is permitted, or you can create separate logins.

Q: How do I see my wish list?
A: Go to My Account, select 'Product Lists,' then click 'View My List.'

title: FAQ - Products & Materials
content:
Products & Materials FAQs:

Q: How do I view pricing?
A: You have to log in to your account to view pricing.

Q: Do you have Fabric Care Instructions and Fire Certificates?
A: Yes, both are available on the certificate page.

Q: Do you have product warranty information?
A: Yes, warranty details appear on individual product pages.

Q: Do you have a structural integrity statement?
A: Yes, one is available as a downloadable PDF.

title: FAQ - Orders & Order Status
content:
Orders & Order Status FAQs:

Q: I need a graphic print with hardware. How do I order it?
A: Purchase the graphic package, then upload your artwork via the confirmation page or later through My Account.

Q: How do I ensure my graphic order arrives on time?
A: Submit your artwork before noon, 12:00 PM PT on the day you place your order and approve proofs before 3:00 PM PT.

Q: How do I order custom print without hardware?
A: Select 'graphic only' options on product pages, or visit the Printing page to order by square footage.

Q: I want to reorder—do you save my order history?
A: Order history is available, but you must repurchase items individually. Art files are saved for three months only.

Q: How do I change quantities or cancel items?
A: Once processing begins, orders cannot be edited online. Call customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1.

Q: When will my order ship?
A: Hardware-only orders ship same-day if ordered by 3:00 PM PT (California) or noon PT (Pennsylvania). Graphic orders ship end-of-day on the final production day.

Q: When will my order arrive?
A: Arrival depends on your shipping method. Use the UPS transit calculator or check your tracking information.

Q: Has my order shipped? How do I track it?
A: Click 'My Account,' then 'Review orders / track packages' to access UPS tracking details.

Q: My order never arrived. Now what?
A: Contact customer service immediately at 800-640-9544, press 1, with your order number ready.

Q: An item is missing from my shipment. Now what?
A: Have your order number ready and contact customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1.

Q: My product is missing parts. Now what?
A: Check the spec sheet on the Templates page for the complete parts list. If parts are missing, contact customer service with your order number.

Q: When will a backorder item arrive?
A: Contact customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1, or email info@wsdisplay.com for estimated arrival dates.

title: FAQ - Graphic Art Files
content:
Graphic Art Files FAQs:

Q: How do I upload art?
A: After ordering, click 'upload file' on the confirmation page, or log in later and use the Graphics link in My Account.

Q: What art file formats do you accept?
A: PDF (recommended), EPS, TIFF, Adobe Illustrator, and Adobe Photoshop.

Q: What resolution does my art need to be at?
A: 125 DPI.

Q: What color mode do you print in?
A: CMYK.

Q: What does approving my graphic proof mean?
A: It confirms you're aware of your image quality based on the file(s) provided.

Q: Where can I find templates and spec sheets?
A: Visit the Templates page to download templates, setup instructions, and specification sheets.

Q: How do I request graphic design service?
A: Purchase a graphic product, type 'Need graphic design help' in order notes, then contact customer service with your sales order number.

Q: What will graphic design charges be?
A: Graphic design charge is $65/hour with a minimum of 30 minutes.

Q: How do I order a PMS color match?
A: Visit the PMS Color Match page, select your desired colors, and provide PMS numbers in order notes.

Q: Do you have free printed swatches?
A: Yes, order them via the Free Sample Swatch page.

title: FAQ - Graphic Turnaround Time & Rushes
content:
Graphic Turnaround Time & Rush FAQs:

Q: What is my graphic turnaround time?
A: Most graphic turnaround times are two (2) business days of production time after proof approval. Complex items may take longer.

Q: How does turnaround time work for quantity orders?
A: Each item has different turnaround times. Contact customer service for details on your specific order.

Q: Does hardware ship the same day?
A: Yes, but it must be purchased by 3:00 PM PT (California) or by 12:00 PM (Noon) PT (Pennsylvania).

Q: Are there limits to getting a rush?
A: Yes, time and quantity constraints apply. Contact customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1.

Q: Do all products allow a rush?
A: Yes, subject to workload and available time.

Q: How do I order a rush?
A: Some products offer set-priced rush options under 'Graphic Turnaround Time.' Select and add to cart.

Q: How fast does a rush push my order ahead?
A: A next-day rush ships the following business day if approved by 3:00 PM PT. Two-day and three-day rushes follow accordingly.

Q: Do rush fees apply per item or once?
A: Rush fees apply per item.

Q: I need this shipped out today. Is this possible?
A: Maybe—depends on product type and time. Call customer service about same-day rush options.

Q: Will there be times when a rush is not available?
A: Yes; these times vary and depend on workload.

title: FAQ - Payment, Billing & Promotions
content:
Payment, Billing & Promotion FAQs:

Q: What are my payment choices?
A: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Net 30 (with approval), Check, or Cash.

Q: Do I have to pay sales tax?
A: Tax applies to blind shipments to California, Pennsylvania, and Hawaii unless you provide a resale certificate.

Q: How do I get a copy of my receipt/invoice?
A: Log in to My Account and under 'My Orders,' click 'Print invoices.'

Q: When will my credit appear?
A: Within 7-10 business days (or after returned items are received).

Q: When will my credit card be charged?
A: Immediately, though additional charges may accrue until shipment for rush fees or upgrades.

Q: What promotions do you have?
A: Monthly specials, 15% showroom discount (with company logo approval), and WS Prime for free ground shipping.

Q: How do I use a coupon/promo code?
A: Add items to cart, enter the code below the items, and click 'apply.'

Q: What does prepaid by check mean?
A: It means payment via check received before shipment—used by Net 30 customers or those picking up locally.

Q: What is Net 30?
A: Net 30 is a line of store credit through WS Display which starts at $2,500.

title: FAQ - Shipping & Pick Up
content:
Shipping & Pick Up FAQs:

Q: Can I ship an order to multiple addresses?
A: Yes—first 5 addresses have no handling fee; 6+ addresses incur a $3.00 fee per additional location.

Q: What shipping carrier do you use?
A: We use UPS.

Q: How much money will shipping cost me?
A: Cost depends on weight, quantity, daily UPS rates, warehouse location, and destination. Calculate it during checkout.

Q: Does UPS charge a residential fee?
A: Yes, residential deliveries cost more due to single-location delivery versus commercial addresses.

Q: What free shipping programs exist?
A: Four programs: WS Prime, One Choice Products (free bulk ground), free shipping on certain items (Scrim Vinyl, Blankets), and free bulk shipping on yard signs.

Q: Do you ship internationally?
A: Yes, to Canada and Puerto Rico directly. For other destinations, customers must arrange shipping and documentation.

Q: Do you blind/drop ship?
A: Yes. Enter the desired ship-to address at checkout and note 'Blind Ship' in payment notes. Blind shipping is free of charge.

Q: What expedited shipping options exist?
A: UPS 3 Day Select, UPS 2nd Day Air, UPS Next Day Air, and other premium options available during checkout.

Q: How do I upgrade shipping after ordering?
A: Call customer service at 800-640-9544, press 1. Additional charges apply.

Q: Is Saturday delivery available?
A: It may qualify depending on destination and shipment timing. Call customer service for availability and pricing.

Q: When will my order be delivered?
A: UPS delivers Monday through Friday, unless Saturday delivery is requested. Dates depend on shipping method and location.

Q: Can I pick up my order?
A: Yes—Carlsbad, CA (5960 Pascal Ct.) or Carlisle, PA (6 Pine Hill Dr.).

Q: How do I place a pick up order?
A: Select warehouse under 'Shipping From,' add to cart, enter destination info, select 'In-Store Pickup,' and complete checkout.

Q: When can I pick up my order?
A: Between 3:00 PM and 5:00 PM on your scheduled pickup day, or during business hours afterward.

Q: Can I use my own UPS account?
A: Yes—select 'Use Own UPS Account' at checkout and enter your account number and billing address in payment notes.

Q: Can I use my own freight carrier (FedEx, DHL, etc.)?
A: Yes—call customer service, place an order selecting 'In-Store Pickup,' note your carrier in payment notes, confirm ship date, and email shipping documents to info@wsdisplay.com.

Q: Can you ship to military bases overseas?
A: No.

title: FAQ - Returns, Warranties & Terms
content:
Returns, Warranties & Terms FAQs:

Q: What is your return policy?
A: Graphic items have no returns due to custom nature. Hardware items may be returned within 30 days of receipt in original, unmarked packaging for exchange or refund.

Q: What do I do if my product arrives damaged?
A: Contact customer service within 48 hours via email at info@wsdisplay.com.

Q: Where can I contact you regarding returns or warranty?
A: Email returns@wsdisplay.com for fastest response.

Q: What do I do if my product gets damaged within warranty?
A: Email info@wsdisplay.com with your order number and details.

Q: I received the wrong product. Now what?
A: Contact customer service within 48 hours via info@wsdisplay.com.

Q: What is your warranty?
A: Two types: 1-Year Warranty and Lifetime Warranty against manufacturing defects. Check individual product pages for specifics.

Q: Is your site secure?
A: Yes. This website is protected with SSL (secure socket layer) encryption.

title: FAQ - Sales & Marketing Tools
content:
Sales & Marketing Tools FAQs:

Q: What is ExhibitBook?
A: ExhibitBook is a non-branded resource guide for WS Display distributors and is void of any pricing.

Q: Where can I find instructional videos?
A: Visit Exhibit Book Videos on YouTube for non-branded instructional content.

Q: What is WS Prime?
A: WS Prime is a program offering free ground shipping to distributors and end-users on eligible products.

Q: How can I use your website as a job bidding tool?
A: Select ship-from location, add products to cart, enter delivery details, and view wholesale pricing and shipping costs.

Q: How do I request a catalog with prices?
A: Email info@wsdisplay.com with your email address.

Q: What is the showroom discount?
A: The showroom discount is 15% off most products when your company logo appears (minimum 6 inch size).

Q: Where do I find graphic templates and specs?
A: Visit the Templates page or Exhibit Book Download.

Q: How do I apply for Net 30 credit?
A: Click the Forms link to access the credit application.

Q: Do you offer volume pricing?
A: Some products show quantity discounts online. For others, complete the large-quantity quote form and email bd@wsdisplay.com.

Q: How do I get a large-quantity quote?
A: Email bd@wsdisplay.com with completed form details. Expect a response within approximately 24 hours.

Q: Are free material swatches available?
A: Yes, order them via the Free Sample Swatch page.

title: One Choice Products Program
content:
One Choice Products Program Overview:

One Choice Products is WS Display's cost-driven, automated graphic package initiative featuring best-selling portable displays at reduced prices. The program emphasizes simplified purchasing and lower price points through streamlined processes.

Key Benefits:
- Reduced pricing compared to standard products due to automated ordering
- Uses identical materials to standard product lines (same quality)
- Free Ground BULK shipping anywhere (one address) in the US
- Expedited production timelines

Printing Specifications:
- Stretch Fabric & Dye Sub Tent: Paper transfer dye sublimation
- Super Flat Vinyl: UV printing
- Mesh: Direct dye sublimation

Production Location: All One Choice products are manufactured at the New Pacific Fulfillment Center.

Ordering Policies:
- Orders MUST be placed on the website (online only)
- No customization available—products are standard automated options
- No phone/email orders accepted
- No shipping upgrades—standard ground shipping only to maintain cost efficiency
- Multiple address surcharge: $3.00 per address for six or more locations

Art Submission Timeline:
- Orders must be placed before 12:00 PM PST
- Graphic approval required by 4:00 PM PT for next-business-day shipping
- Turnaround begins after proof approval

One Choice Product Categories:
- One Choice Roll Up Banner Stands
- One Choice Canopy Tents (5ft, 10ft, 15ft, 20ft)
- One Choice Feather Flags
- One Choice Fabric Displays
- One Choice Fabric Pop Up Displays
- One Choice SEG Pop Up Display
- One Choice Backlit Displays
- One Choice Lightbox
- One Choice Hanging Banners
- One Choice Table Throws (Regular, Multi Stretch, Fitted, Topper, Round)
- One Choice X Banner Stand (5-pack)
- One Choice 8x3 ft Custom Banner
- One Choice QSEG Quick Wall Display
- One Choice Gopher Pop Up Counter
- One Choice Showcase Kits (Kit 1-5)
- One Choice Kai Indoor Banner Stand

title: Graphics Specifications
content:
Graphics Specifications for Artwork Submission:

File Setup Requirements:
- Color Mode: All artwork must be in CMYK. RGB files will not print accurately.
- Resolution: Images require 300 DPI minimum. Overall document: 125 to 150 DPI for Photoshop. Vector elements remain sharp at any size.
- Document Size: Save final file at exact specifications from template.

Acceptable File Formats:
- Preferred: PDF (Print Optimized)
- Also Acceptable: TIFF, JPG, AI, EPS, PSD (flattened)

Text & Font Requirements:
- Outline all fonts before submission to prevent missing or substituted fonts during output.

Image Guidelines:
- All images must be embedded (no linked files)
- Avoid low-resolution or screen captures
- Match exact dimensions specified in templates

Color Standards:
True Black Formula:
- Stretch/Multi-Stretch/Roll Up: C:0, M:0, Y:0, K:100
- Other materials: C:75, M:75, Y:75, K:100

Pantone Colors: May specify from official Pantone library, but printing occurs in CMYK conversion.

File Preparation:
- Remove template lines, crop marks, and guidance layers before uploading
- Use only standard CMYK color swatches

Additional Services:
- Graphic Design Support: $65/hour (Express, Custom, or Advanced options)
- PMS Color Match Service: Available for color-critical projects (adds 1-2 business days)

title: Retractable Banner Stands
content:
Retractable Banner Stands Product Line:

WS Display offers a full range of retractable (roll-up) banner stands for portable display applications.

Products Available:
1. One Choice Roll Up Banner Stands - Value-priced bulk option with free ground shipping
2. Silverstep Retractable Banner Stand - Premium model available in 24", 36", 48", 60" widths; floor and tabletop versions; heights 36"-92"; Super Flat Vinyl or Black & White Fabric; silver or black frame; lifetime warranty on select models
3. Econo Roll Retractable Banner Stand - Economical option in 24", 31.5", 33.5", 36" widths; 80" height; silver or black frame; includes padded travel bag; clamp bar top; double-sided tape bottom attachment
4. Silverwing Retractable Banner Stand
5. Steppy Retractable Banner Stand
6. Cinch Retractable Banner Stand
7. Contour Retractable Banner Stand
8. Doublestep Retractable Banner Stand (24" and 36") - Double-sided display
9. Maui Retractable Banner Stand
10. Portable Roll Up Banner Stand
11. Clear Retractable Banner Stands
12. Retractable Banner Stand Accessories and Parts

General Features:
- Single-sided or double-sided options depending on model
- Super Flat Vinyl or fabric graphic materials
- Order types: Frame Only, Graphic Package, Graphic Only
- Standard turnaround: 1-2 business days
- Warranty: Lifetime or 1-year depending on model
- Weight range: 5-26 lbs depending on model
- Widths: 24"-60" depending on model
- Heights: 36"-92" depending on model

title: Trade Show Booths
content:
Trade Show Booth Systems:

WS Display offers a comprehensive range of modular trade show booth systems in various sizes from 10ft to 40ft widths.

Booth Systems Available:

1. CABO Booths (A through F) - Extrusion-based modular booth system using SEG aluminum profiles

2. Modco Modular Displays - Tool-free perforated modular aluminum frames with toolless pin connectors. Available in 10ft, 15ft, 20ft, 30ft, 40ft widths. Includes towers, counters, louver options, bulk frames, and accessories. SEG graphics system. Look Book, Parts List, and 3D Files (OBJ) available.

3. Origami SEG Truss - Truss-based booth system with inline and island configurations (models A through I). Lightweight aluminum truss with SEG fabric graphics.

4. Showbird 120 - Brilliant backlit displays with maximum flexibility. High-impact lighting meets modular design. Available in 10x10 and 20x10 configurations (A through E). Dye Sub Backlit material. Standard 2 business day turnaround. New arrival product line.

5. Showbird 65 - Modular booth offering with configurations, single frames, counters, and accessories. Available in 10x10 and 20x10 configurations.

6. QSEG Quick Wall Displays - Versatile partition and tradeshow display system. Categories: Partition Solutions, Tradeshow Applications, Single Frames, Counters, and Accessories.

7. SEGO Modular Lightbox - Advanced technology with toolless assembly down to its feet. Magnetic electrical connectors power UL certified LED lights pre-installed in profiles. Single frames from 3.3x3.3 ft to 9.8x8 ft. Configurations from 10x10 to 20x10 ft. Materials: Black & White Fabric, Block Out Backer, Dye Sub Backlit, Stretch Fabric. Standard 2 business day turnaround.

8. Lumiere Light Wall - Combination of silicone-edge graphics and RPL fabric pop ups. Categories: Pre-Designed Configurations, Backlit Displays, Non-Backlit Displays, Bridge, Counter, Door, External Shelf, Dual Edge Light, Accessories.

9. Tahoe Modular Displays - Twistlock display system with accessories.

10. Step and Repeat Displays - Available in 10ft, 15ft, 20ft, and 30ft widths.

11. Backlit Displays - Multiple backlit options across various booth systems.

Order Types: Frame Only, Graphic Package, Graphic Only
Graphic Packages available in 10ft, 15ft, 20ft, 30ft, and 40ft widths.

title: Fabric Displays
content:
Fabric Display Product Line:

WS Display offers an extensive range of fabric-based display solutions for trade shows, retail, and events.

Products Available:

1. One Choice Fabric Displays - Value-priced fabric display options
2. One Choice Fabric Pop Up Displays
3. One Choice Hanging Banners

4. EZ Extend Fabric Displays - Portable banner stand system. Fast setup with lightweight tube frame. Single-sided or double-sided dye-sublimated stretch fabric. White or black back fabric options. Standard 7.5ft hardware with sizes from 5.5ft to 11.5ft height. Widths: 24", 36", 42", 48", 60", 84" (2-7 ft). Heights: 66"-138" (6-12 ft).

5. EZ Tube Displays - Lightweight modular frames with aluminum snap-button tubes in 30mm, 34mm, or 43mm sizes. Stretch-fabric pillowcase graphics with dye-sublimated printing. Widths from 3 to 30 feet. Heights from 2 to 30 feet. Shapes: straight, curve, S-shape, tower, kicktail. Includes tabletop units, backwalls, towers, counters, headboards, pillars.

6. EZ Tube Connect Modular Displays - Larger modular tube connection systems
7. EZ Stand Fabric Display
8. EZ Barrier Fabric Display - Barrier/divider style (indoor and outdoor versions)
9. EZ Tower Fabric Displays - Tall tower-format displays
10. EZ Kicktail Displays - Angled fabric display
11. Wallbox - Wall-mounted fabric display
12. SEG Pop Up Display
13. RPL Pop Up Backlit - Illuminated pop-up displays
14. RPL Non-Backlit - Standard pop-up displays
15. Stretch Fabric Pop Up

16. Hanging Banners - Available in multiple shapes:
    - Circle, Square, Triangle
    - Tapered Circle, Tapered Square, Tapered Triangle
    - Football shape, Wave, Flat Panel
    - Cube (3D)
    - Hanging Banner Accessories

17. QSEG Single Frames

Materials: Stretch fabric, multi-stretch fabric, black and white fabric, blockout fabric, dye sub backlit
Order Types: Frame Only, Graphic Package, Graphic Only
Turnaround: 1-2 business days standard

title: SEG Extrusions (Resort Collection)
content:

WS Display offers 15 aluminum extrusion profiles pre-grooved for SEG (Silicone Edge Graphics) fabric graphics, supporting both non-backlit and backlit configurations.

Aluminum Profiles Available:
1. Aspen Slim (19mm) - Slim non-backlit profile
2. Aspen 40D - 40mm double-sided profile
3. Vail 40S - 40mm single-sided
4. Vail 40D - 40mm double-sided
5. Vail 60S - 60mm single-sided
6. Vail 60D - 60mm double-sided
7. Vail 80S - 80mm single-sided
8. Vail 100D - 100mm double-sided
9. Vail 120DB - 120mm double-sided backlit
10. Vail 180DB - 180mm double-sided backlit
11. Big Sky 32D - 32mm double-sided
12. Big Sky 60D - 60mm double-sided
13. Big Sky Triangle - Triangular profile
14. Onyx Profile - Specialty profile
15. Cabo Extrusion - Part of non-backlit resort extrusions

Display Configurations:
- Wall-mounted installations
- Free-standing displays with feet
- Single-sided and double-sided
- Corner, tower, counter, or booth-style frames
- Integrated LED lighting for backlit applications
- Quick graphic updates for refreshed look

Applications: Retail, trade shows, custom projects
Accessories and parts available separately
Profile widths range from 40mm to 180mm
Vail Fabric Frames available in multiple profile configurations

title: Certificates & Documentation
content:
Certificates & Material Documentation:

WS Display provides fire safety certificates and fabric care documentation for all their materials.

Fire Certificates Available:
- Dye Sub Backlit Fabric
- Stretch Fabric (used in EZ Tube Displays, RPL Fabric Pop Up Displays, table throws, hanging banners)
- Multi Stretch Fabric (specific to stretch table throws)
- Black and White Fabric (used in retractable banner stands and classic banner displays)
- Mesh Fabric (used in outdoor flag products: Falcon, Sunbird, Mamba, Mondo flags)
- Scrim Vinyl (used in outdoor banner stands and grasshopper adjustable models)
- One Choice Tent Fabric (covers tent products, includes labels sewn into tent valances)

Fabric Care Instructions:
Unified care sheets available for: stretch fabric, mesh fabric, dye-sub tent fabric, dye-sub backlit fabric, multistretch fabric, and black/white fabrics. These provide guidance on maintaining product integrity and longevity.

Structural Documentation:
Hanging Banner Structural Integrity Engineer Stamp available, certifying engineering standards for hanging banner products.

All certificates are accessible through PDF downloads on the Resources/Certificate page.

title: Tax & Resale Certificate Policy
content:
Tax & Resale Certificate Information:

WS Display collects sales tax on drop-shipped orders to states where they have nexus (legal presence). Customers can avoid tax by providing valid resale certificates before orders ship.

States Requiring Tax Collection:
Arizona, Arkansas, California, Connecticut, Florida, Georgia, Hawaii, Illinois, Indiana, Kansas, Kentucky, Maryland, Michigan, New Jersey, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Pennsylvania, South Dakota, Texas, Utah, Virginia, Washington, West Virginia, and Wisconsin.

Key Policy Points:
- A copy of the exempt certificate must be provided prior to the order being finalized and invoiced to avoid taxation.
- California's 10% Markup Rule: For out-of-state resellers without California certificates, tax is calculated on a retail selling price plus a markup of 10 percent.
- Certificate Validity: Most states accept blanket certificates valid for one year, requiring annual renewal.

Certificate Requirements by State Type:

States Accepting Out-of-State Seller Numbers:
Arizona, Arkansas, Connecticut, Georgia, Indiana, Kansas, Kentucky, Michigan, New Jersey, North Carolina, Ohio, Pennsylvania, South Dakota, Texas, Utah, Washington, West Virginia, Wisconsin

States Requiring Own Certificates Only:
California, Florida, Hawaii, Illinois, Maryland, Virginia

Standard Tax Rates (Examples):
- Arizona: 5.6-11.2%
- Pennsylvania: 6% (origin-based)
- Texas: 8%
- Hawaii: 0.5-4.5% (GET privilege tax, not sales tax)

Contact: info@wsdisplay.com | 800-640-9544

title: Product Comparison Charts
content:
Product Comparison Charts:

WS Display provides detailed comparison charts for major product categories.

Retractable Banner Stands (14 models compared):
- Width ranges: 24"-60" (SilverStep) to fixed 33.5" (most models)
- Graphic height: 36"-92" adjustable or fixed at 69"-80"
- Materials: Fabric or super flat vinyl
- Base colors: Black or silver
- Leader material: Canvas with velcro or plastic with adhesive
- Warranty: Lifetime or one-year depending on model
- Weight: 5-26 lbs
- Features: Changeable graphics, reset tension, removable endcaps on select models

Table Throws (5 categories: One Choice, Regular, Fitted, Stretch, Runner):
- Available widths: 2-8 feet depending on type
- Material: Stretch or multi-stretch fabric
- Sides: 3 or 4-sided options
- Finishing: Hemming, rubber feet on some
- Print process: Paper transfer across all models

Bags/Cases (13 specialized carrying solutions):
- Sizes from 14"W x 34"H x 13"D to 63.5"L x 14.5"W x 10"H
- Features: wheels, handles, straps on various models

Fabric Displays/Backwalls (5 types):
- Width ranges: 60"-345"
- Depth: 12"-36"
- Materials: stretch fabric, blockout panels, satin/UV backlit

Canopy Tents (12 configurations):
- Sizes: 5ft to 20ft
- Construction: Steel or aluminum
- Adjustable heights: 69"-142"
- Adjustment: Crank or spring-loaded mechanisms

SEG Extrusions (9 profile types):
- Aspen Slim through Vail 180DB
- Widths: 40-180mm
- Options: single/double-sided, backlit, various mounting

Printing Materials (14 substrates):
- Thickness: 4.28-13.27 oz/yd²
- Printing methods: UV, dye-sub
- Applications: retractables to lightboxes

Tube Frames & Lightboxes:
- EZ Tube variants, wallbox systems
- 12 lightbox models
- Tube diameter: 30-56mm
- Various lighting types and modular capabilities

title: WS Prime Program
content:
WS Prime Program:

WS Prime is WS Display's premium shipping program offering free ground shipping to distributors and end-users on eligible products. It is one of four free shipping programs offered by WS Display.

Free Shipping Programs:
1. WS Prime - Free ground shipping on eligible products for enrolled members
2. One Choice Products - Free bulk ground shipping to a single address in the US
3. Free shipping on certain items (Scrim Vinyl, Blankets)
4. Free bulk shipping on yard signs

WS Prime website: https://www.wsprime.com/

title: Shipping Policies
content:
Shipping Policies:

Carrier: UPS (primary carrier)
Delivery: Monday through Friday standard; Saturday delivery available upon request for additional cost.

Shipping Options:
- UPS Ground
- UPS 3 Day Select
- UPS 2nd Day Air
- UPS Next Day Air
- Customer's own UPS account
- Customer's own freight carrier (FedEx, DHL, etc.) with special process

Warehouse Locations (Ship From):
- Carlsbad, CA (5960 Pascal Ct., Carlsbad, CA 92008)
- Carlisle, PA (6 Pine Hill Dr., Carlisle, PA)

Hardware Shipping Cutoff Times:
- California warehouse: 3:00 PM PT for same-day shipping
- Pennsylvania warehouse: 12:00 PM (Noon) PT for same-day shipping

Multiple Address Shipping:
- First 5 addresses: No handling fee
- 6+ addresses: $3.00 fee per additional location

International Shipping:
- Canada and Puerto Rico: Direct shipping available
- Other countries: Customer must arrange own shipping and documentation
- Military bases overseas: Not available

Blind/Drop Shipping:
- Available and free of charge
- Enter ship-to address at checkout and note 'Blind Ship' in payment notes

In-Store Pickup:
- Available at both Carlsbad, CA and Carlisle, PA locations
- Pickup hours: Between 3:00 PM and 5:00 PM on scheduled day, or during business hours afterward

Residential Delivery:
- UPS charges additional residential delivery fees

title: Return Policy
content:
Return Policy:

- Graphic/printed items: NO returns accepted due to custom nature of printed products.
- Hardware items: May be returned within 30 days of receipt in original, unmarked packaging for exchange or refund.
- Damaged products: Contact customer service within 48 hours via email at info@wsdisplay.com.
- Wrong product received: Contact customer service within 48 hours via info@wsdisplay.com.
- Credits: Appear within 7-10 business days (or after returned items are received).
- Returns contact: returns@wsdisplay.com for fastest response.

Warranty:
- Two warranty types available: 1-Year Warranty and Lifetime Warranty against manufacturing defects.
- Specific warranty type varies by product—check individual product pages.
- For warranty claims: Email info@wsdisplay.com with order number and details.
